faqs.question: Why are stink bugs so common in Rosebank?
faqs.answer: Rosebank's coastal location, mature vegetation, and older housing stock provide ideal conditions for stink bugs. These pests are attracted to the warmth of homes, especially during fall and winter, and easily find entry through gaps in siding, windows, and foundations common in the area's historic buildings.

faqs.question: What does your stink bug control service include?
faqs.answer: Our service includes a thorough inspection of your Rosebank property, identification of entry points, targeted treatment of affected areas, exterior perimeter protection, and sealing recommendations. We also provide follow-up visits as needed and seasonal prevention strategies to keep stink bugs out year-round.

faqs.question: When is the best time to treat for stink bugs in Rosebank?
faqs.answer: The ideal time for stink bug prevention is late summer to early fall (August-September) before they begin seeking indoor shelter. However, we provide effective treatment year-round, including winter removal of stink bugs already inside your home and spring treatments to prevent their emergence.

faqs.question: Are your stink bug treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and application methods specifically chosen for residential safety. Our technicians are trained to apply treatments in a targeted manner that effectively eliminates stink bugs while minimizing any risk to children, pets, and the environment in your Rosebank home.
